description: Product inventory/stock management - receive stock batches and view inventory levels
authentication: Bearer JWT token required, admin roles only

endpoints.name: Receive Inventory Batch
endpoints.description: Record a new stock shipment/receipt for a product. Creates batch record and updates available quantity.

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin records receiving new stock. Adds batch to history and increments product's available quantity.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, batch appears in inventory history table, product stock count updates

endpoints.name: Get Inventory Batches
endpoints.description: View all inventory batch records with product details

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays inventory batch history table showing each shipment with product name, SKU, batch number, quantity, expiry date, and receipt date

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Inventory history table with sortable columns: Date, Product Name, SKU, Batch #, Quantity, Expiry. May include search/filter by product.
